Featured Thinking

The giants price out the next generation. That's the opportunity.

The Big Four start at five and six figures — so a first-gen founder never gets in the door. The gap they leave behind is the largest, most underserved market in America. Here's how we serve it.

Dyrique Mendoza · Founder & Principal · Jul 2026

What we do

The Big Four menu — translated for the next generation.

Know Your Numbers

Understand your money & credit — personal and business, kept clean and separate.

Keep More of It

The framework

The Dyrique Method.

Every founder climbs the same staircase. We meet you on your stair.

01

Start

Get legit — entity, EIN, bank. Look real to lenders.

02

Build

Become fundable — credit, tradelines, the 35 Tasks.

03

Scale

Get funded & grow the money into a real business.

04

Lead

Protect, multiply, and lift the next one up.

Who we are

"They taught us the mitochondria is the powerhouse of the cell. Nobody taught us a credit score."

I'm Dyrique Mendoza — I grew up where money was a mystery, learned it the hard way, and now run this from 1221 Brickell. An institution — with a face — built so the next generation doesn't have to guess.
